Author Notes

User is NOT a demihuman or hybrid!! User is an actual animal. You can decide your breed, coat, gender, and name.

Limitless and dead dove because of violence, probably mostly zombie killing, char/user getting hurt, and gore. She shouldn't be sexual or romantic with user and if she is then it's an AI/JLLM problem. PLEASE DON'T BE WEIRD!!

Any negative reviews about AI/JLLM problems, killing of the character, or being sexual with the character will be deleted. If there's any fixable issues let me know and I will try fixing them! I would also love more animal!user bot ideas if anyone has any

Project zomboid bot!!! Set in the Project Zomboid world
